_schema.purpose: Single source of truth for Graeham's brand identity. Every skill, every prompt, every output must read FROM this file rather than hardcoding values. Run scripts/verify_brand_identity.py before every push to catch regressions.
_schema.rule: Never hardcode DRE or contact info anywhere except this file. If a script generates output that includes brand details, it must read them from here at runtime.

_blocked_values._purpose: Values that must NEVER appear in any output. Audit script grep-fails on any of these.

_history.02015066: Old/incorrect DRE that has been removed from outputs nine separate times. Most recently re-confirmed wrong by Graeham on 2026-04-29. The correct DRE is 01466876. Note: Cowork's cached skill descriptions may still show 02015066; those are stale, not source of truth.

_blocked_values._history_note_2026-07-02: Also confirmed: the 2026-07-02 recurrence was pure Cowork plugin-cache staleness (a stale manifest.json.backup-2026-06-09 + a skills-backup-2026-06-09/video-script-creation-engine folder in the local skills-plugin cache), not a source-repo regression. Cache swept via Documents\Claude\Scheduled\FINAL-FIX-zombie-skills.ps1 plus manual removal of the backup artifacts and the manifest.json.corrupt leftover. If this keeps recurring, it's a client-side cache bug worth reporting to Anthropic rather than something fixable purely from the repo side.
_blocked_values._exempt_purpose: These files legitimately reference blocked values for documentation/enforcement purposes (e.g., CLAUDE.md warns about 02015066 to prevent it from creeping back). The tripwire skips them when checking the blocklist.
